# SportMind — AI Agent Manifest

> The open sports intelligence library for AI agents.
> SportMind teaches AI agents how to reason about sports — not just react to data.

Repository: https://github.com/SportMind/SportMind
License: MIT
Version: 3.93.4
Maintainer: @SportMind

---

## What SportMind is

SportMind is a structured collection of sport-specific skills for AI agents. Each skill is a
markdown document that gives an agent:

- A domain model of how a sport works (calendar, events, result types)
- Sport-specific risk variables that have no equivalent in other sports
- Ready-to-deploy event playbooks (trigger → entry → exit → filter → sizing)
- Signal weight recommendations for each sport
- Agent reasoning prompts (system prompt fragments)

Layer 2 (athlete skills) provides:
- Player availability and form scores
- A composite modifier (0.55–1.25) that adjusts base prediction signals
- Athlete-level intelligence across 29 sports (including darts, cross-sport meta orchestrator)

Layer 3 (fan-token skills) provides:
- The foundational value thesis (fan-token-why.md) — why fan tokens exist and what
  structural problems they solve that the traditional model cannot
- On-chain fan token intelligence (HAS, TVI, geographic holder data)
- Athlete commercial intelligence (AELS, ABS, AFS scores)
- Sport-specific token intelligence bridges (football, F1, MMA, esports)
- Transfer, sponsorship, and brand intelligence
- Fan token lifecycle intelligence (six phases, non-contractual token framework)
- Partnership intelligence (health monitoring, termination patterns, relaunch signals)

SportMind is platform-agnostic. It works with any AI agent framework, any sports data platform,
and any prediction market or fan token ecosystem.

---

## Five-layer architecture

```
Layer 1 — Sport domain skills (sports/)
  Answers: How does this sport work? What events matter? What are the risks?

Layer 2 — Athlete intelligence skills (athlete/)
  Answers: Who is playing? Are they fit? Are they in form? How does that change the prediction?

Layer 3 — Fan token commercial intelligence (fan-token/)
  Answers: Is this athlete driving token engagement? What is their commercial value?
           How do transfers and competitions affect the on-chain token ecosystem?

Layer 4 — Market intelligence (market/)
  Answers: How large is this market? Who is the fanbase? What is the fan token readiness tier?
           Is there institutional blockchain interest? What would trigger a token launch?

Layer 5 — Macro intelligence (macro/)
  Answers: Are there external forces (pandemic, war, recession, crypto bear market, broadcast
           disruption, climate, governance scandal) currently affecting the sport or token market?
           How does this change the sizing and direction of all other signals?
```

---

## Available skills

### Sport domain skills (Layer 1) — 28 complete, 14 community stubs

| Skill path | Sport | Status |
|---|---|---|
| sports/football | Football / Soccer | stable |
| sports/basketball | NBA / EuroLeague | stable |
| sports/mma | UFC / PFL / ONE Championship | stable |
| sports/esports | CS2, LoL, Valorant, Dota2 | stable |
| sports/american-football | NFL | stable |
| sports/golf | PGA Tour / LIV Golf / Majors | stable |
| sports/boxing | IBF/WBA/WBC/WBO title structure | stable |
| sports/athletics | Olympic cycle / Diamond League | stable |
| sports/cycling | Grand Tours / Classics | stable |
| sports/horse-racing | Cheltenham / Grand National | stable |
| sports/snooker | Crucible / Triple Crown | stable |
| sports/darts | PDC / Ally Pally | stable |
| sports/rugby-league | Super League / NRL | stable |
| sports/netball | World Cup / Commonwealth Games | stable |
| sports/swimming | Olympic cycle / world records | stable |
| sports/rowing | Olympics / Boat Race | stable |
| sports/winter-sports | Olympic cycle / Four Hills | stable |
| sports/cricket | IPL / ICC / format differences | stable |
| sports/rugby | Union / Six Nations / World Cup | stable |
| sports/tennis | ATP / WTA / Grand Slams | stable |
| sports/formula1 | Race calendar / regulation cycles | stable |

### Athlete intelligence skills (Layer 2) — 29 complete

| Skill path | Sport | Key output |
|---|---|---|
| athlete/football | Football | Availability, xG form, GK rating, lineup confirmation |
| athlete/mma | MMA | Striking, grappling, round profile, fight camp signals |
| athlete/esports | Esports | Roster status, HLTV rating, meta readiness |
| athlete/nfl | NFL | QB CPOE, O-line health, injury designations |
| athlete/nba | NBA | Load management, on/off splits, clutch TS% |
| athlete/nhl | NHL | Goaltender start, special teams, Corsi |
| athlete/cricket | Cricket | Batter vs bowler H2H, pitch, toss impact |
| athlete/tennis | Tennis | Serve metrics, surface record, H2H dynamics |
| athlete/rugby | Rugby | Set piece, kicker accuracy, halfback partnership |
| athlete/golf | Golf | Course history, strokes gained, cut line |
| athlete/boxing | Boxing | Belt status, weigh-in, fight camp, finishing tendency |
| athlete/cycling | Cycling | GC standing, course fit, team role, DNF risk |
| athlete/athletics | Athletics | Form score, WR proximity, doping status |
| athlete/horse-racing | Horse racing | Going preference, C&D record, trainer/jockey |
| athlete/snooker | Snooker | Crucible record, pressure record, break stats |
| athlete/baseball | Baseball | Pitcher PQS, Batter BQS, Statcast profile, platoon splits, velocity tracking |
| athlete/rugby-league | Rugby League | PAS, form rating, PIS, State of Origin modifier |
| athlete/darts | Darts | 3-dart average, checkout %, Ally Pally record |
| athlete/meta | All sports | Cross-sport orchestrator — single modifier pipeline call |
| athlete/formula1 | Formula 1 | Qualifying delta, wet weather rating, regulation fit, grid penalty |
| athlete/afl | AFL | Kicking accuracy, contested possession, clearances |
| athlete/motogp | MotoGP | Rider hardware tier, wet specialist, crash probability |
| athlete/handball | Handball | Goalkeeper save rate, position-specific modifiers |
| athlete/kabaddi | Kabaddi | Raider rating, All Out dynamics, tackle success |
| athlete/nascar | NASCAR | Track type specialisation, stage points strategy |
| athlete/netball | Netball | Goal shooter accuracy, centre pass conversion |
| athlete/rowing | Rowing | Split time, course conditions, taper status |
| athlete/swimming | Swimming | PB proximity, taper timing, multi-event fatigue |
| athlete/winter-sports | Winter Sports | Course fit, snow conditions, Olympic cycle position |

### Fan token commercial intelligence (Layer 3) — 32 skills

| Skill path | Key metrics | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| fan-token/fan-token-why.md | Foundation | Read first — the value thesis; why fan tokens exist; the three structural ceilings; scalability; future trajectory |
| fan-token/fan-token-pulse | HAS, TVI | On-chain baseline — always run first |
| fan-token/performance-on-pitch | PI | Match statistics, scout report, valuation multiplier |
| fan-token/performance-off-pitch | DTS, TAI, PS | Development, loan analysis, rehab |
| fan-token/athlete-social-lift | AELS | Social-to-token correlation |
| fan-token/athlete-social-activity | SHS, AGI | Full social intelligence, brand voice |
| fan-token/transfer-signal | APS, TSI | Token-native rumour intelligence |
| fan-token/transfer-intelligence | TVS, DLVS | Full transfer lifecycle |
| fan-token/brand-score | ABS | Athlete Brand Score — commercial brief |
| fan-token/sponsorship-match | AFS | Brand category rankings, activations |
| fan-token/sports-brand-sponsorship | Market rate | Deal architecture, ROI framework |
| fan-token/football-token-intelligence | FTIS, NCSI, ATM | Football token bridge skill |
| fan-token/formula1-token-intelligence | FTIS, CTI, DTM | F1 token bridge skill |
| fan-token/mma-token-intelligence | FighterTIS, FTM, CRI | MMA token bridge skill |
| fan-token/esports-token-intelligence | OrgTIS, GRM, PRS, RSI | Esports token bridge skill |
| fan-token/fan-token-lifecycle | LTUI | Six-phase lifecycle model; non-contractual token framework; CEX/DEX model; prediction market utility |
| fan-token/fan-token-partnership-intelligence | PHS + VSI | New partnership due diligence; health monitoring; Validator-Adjusted PHS; termination patterns; Type A/B/C case studies |
| fan-token/blockchain-validator-intelligence | VSI, Validator-Adjusted PHS | PSG dual-layer model; on-chain validator monitoring; stake change signals; future multi-validator trajectory |
| fan-token/basketball-token-intelligence | NBATIS | NBA player-centric signal model; trade deadline calendar; EuroLeague club model; Top Shot precedent |
| fan-token/cricket-token-intelligence | CricTIS | Format-dependent model (T20/ODI/Test); India-Pakistan ×2.00; IPL regulatory gap; PSL tokens |
| fan-token/nfl-token-intelligence | NFLTIS | QB injury report system; Super Bowl peak; Fantasy Football gateway; RWC 2027 catalyst |
| fan-token/afl-token-intelligence | AFLTIS | MCG Grand Final architecture; 25% AU crypto adoption; ANZAC Day signal; club membership culture |
| fan-token/rugby-token-intelligence | RugbyTIS | CVC PE investment signal; Six Nations window; RWC 2027 Australia; kicker as primary variable |
| fan-token/rugby-league-token-intelligence | RLTIS | State of Origin disruption + downstream NRL congestion signal; NRL Grand Final; Super League |
| fan-token/handball-token-intelligence | HandTIS | PSG brand halo (+3-5% $PSG at EHF Final4); GK save rate override; Budapest Final4 architecture |
| fan-token/nascar-token-intelligence | NASCARTIS | 72% sponsor loyalty; Daytona 500 peak; Championship 4 architecture; track type taxonomy |
| fan-token/kabaddi-token-intelligence | PKLTIS | Star raider primacy; All Out event signal; JioCinema infrastructure; India VDA catalyst |
| fan-token/netball-token-intelligence | NetTIS | Fastest Tier 2→1 transition; Trans-Tasman ×1.25; shooter accuracy; 75% female fanbase |
| fan-token/baseball-token-intelligence | MLBTIS | Pitcher-first model (PQS); Ohtani dual signal; Latin America + Japan markets; trade deadline |
| fan-token/ice-hockey-token-intelligence | NHLTIS | Goaltender GSAx primary; Game 7 compound signal; Canadian market 3× US; B2B fatigue |
| fan-token/motogp-token-intelligence | MotoTIS | Dorna single-deal model; rider-centric tokens; SE Asia 500M+ fans; wet race hierarchy |
| fan-token/defi-liquidity-intelligence | TVL, Slippage | Liquidity pools; pre-execution filter; LP activity signals; on-chain yield; prediction market protocols |

| Path | Content |
|---|---|
| core/core-athlete-modifier-system.md | Full athlete modifier formula and component reference |
| core/core-signal-weights-by-sport.md | Signal weighting by sport |
| core/core-result-impact-matrices.md | Price impact by result type, all sports |
| core/core-athlete-record-schema.json | Canonical JSON Schema for athlete records |
| core/injury-intelligence/core-injury-intelligence.md | Master injury framework — taxonomy, modifiers, RQD, return-to-play |
| core/injury-intelligence/injury-intel-football.md | Football injury intelligence |
| core/injury-intelligence/injury-intel-mma.md | MMA injury intelligence |
| core/injury-intelligence/injury-intel-nfl.md | NFL injury intelligence |
| core/injury-intelligence/injury-intel-boxing.md | Boxing injury intelligence |
| core/injury-intelligence/injury-intel-horse-racing.md | Horse racing injury intelligence |
| core/injury-intelligence/injury-intel-cycling.md | Cycling injury intelligence |
| core/confidence-output-schema.md | Standard JSON output schema — signal, modifiers, flags, sizing, token signal fields |
| core/core-officiating-intelligence.md | Referee/judge/umpire tendency modifiers — football, MMA, cricket, NFL, horse racing, tennis |
| core/core-weather-match-day.md | Match-day weather signals — cricket, horse racing, NFL, football, golf, rugby, athletics |
| core/core-fixture-congestion.md | Universal congestion framework — 5 tiers, sport-specific guidance, modifier application order |
| core/core-draft-intelligence.md | Draft intelligence — NFL, NBA, NHL, MLB, AFL, esports; pick tier CHZ signal ranges; draft calendar |
| core/core-narrative-momentum.md | Narrative momentum — 8 categories, detection framework, fan token interaction model |
| core/context-window-management.md | Token budgets per file, minimum viable loading sets for 5 use cases, priority ranking, overflow protocol |
| platform/platform-overview.md | What the platform layer adds; open intelligence guarantee; three usage modes |
| platform/api-contracts.md | Formal skill call specifications: inputs, guaranteed outputs, error codes, versioning |
| platform/integration-partners.md | Integration registry: FanTokenIntel, Chiliz, Azuro, data providers, LLMs, SportFi Kit (Partner 7) |
| platform/live-signals.md | Which inputs agents fetch in real-time vs read from static files; self-update architecture |
| platform/skill-registry.md | Queryable catalogue of all 200+ skills; skill IDs; minimum viable sets; query patterns |
| platform/sportmind-mcp-server.md | MCP server spec: 4 tools, Python implementation, Claude Desktop config |
| platform/skill-registry-api.md | Versioned GitHub Pages endpoint documentation; response format; client examples; GitHub Actions workflow |
| examples/applications/ | 7 application blueprints: DeFi prediction market, portfolio intelligence, athlete commercial, brand token strategy, World Cup 2026, GameFi, SportFi Kit full-stack |
| scripts/sportmind_api.py | THE hosted Skills API — serves 159 skill files on demand; GET /stack returns complete intelligence stacks; GitHub Pages export |
| platform/monitoring-alerts.md | Alert specs for macro monitoring and skill reviews; webhook format |
| platform/skill-hashes.json | SHA-256 integrity hashes for all 179 skill files; agents verify received content |
| SECURITY.md | Threat model, security infrastructure, responsible disclosure, trust tiers |
| platform/macro-state.json | Auto-updated macro state; current BTC cycle; active geopolitical/economic events |
| core/sportmind-score.md | Unified cross-sport confidence metric (SMS); 4 components; 0–100 score |
| core/calibration-framework.md | Outcome tracking schema; accuracy methodology; modifier calibration workflow |
| community/leaderboard.md | Contributor accuracy leaderboard; 5-tier system; points formula |
| community/accuracy-tracking.md | Prediction accuracy methodology; outcome record format |
| i18n/README.md | Multi-language support framework; available languages; contribution guide |
| agent-prompts/agent-prompts.md | 7 production-ready system prompts for immediate developer deployment |
| glossary.md | Central terminology — all 28 sports, 34 SportMind metrics, DeFi terms, cross-sport terms |
| core/multi-agent-coordination.md | Production agent guide — patterns (1/2/3), context window budgets, session state, routing, edge cases, deployment checklist |
| examples/ | 6 historical calibration scenarios: UCL final, UFC fight week, State of Origin, IPL DLS, NBA trade deadline, PSG DeFi liquidity |
| core/data-sources.md | Centralised source citations — all five layers, API quick reference, source quality hierarchy |
| core/multi-agent-coordination.md | Production agent architecture — context window management, session state, multi-sport routing, calibration |
| market/world-cup-2026.md | World Cup 2026 module — NCSI by player, national tokens, US market unlock, signal calendar |
| market/market-womens-sports.md | Women's sports market — WSL, NWSL, WNBA, WIPL; demographic advantage; Caitlin Clark |
| market/market-overview.md | Layer 4 master framework — tier definitions, all sport status |
| market/market-key-findings.md | Cross-sport market insights — 12 cross-sport findings only visible at full-library comparison level |
| macro/macro-overview.md | Layer 5 master framework — bifurcated impact model, event taxonomy, crypto cycle modifiers |
| macro/macro-pandemic-public-health.md | Pandemic intelligence — counter-cyclical token resilience, recovery curve |
| macro/macro-geopolitical.md | Geopolitical intelligence — wars, sanctions, diplomatic crises |
| macro/macro-crypto-market-cycles.md | Crypto cycle intelligence — CHZ/BTC correlation, 4-phase modifiers |
| macro/macro-broadcast-disruption.md | Broadcast disruption intelligence — RSN collapse, streaming wars |
| macro/macro-economic-cycles.md | Economic cycle intelligence — recession, discretionary spending, sponsorship lag |
| macro/macro-climate-weather.md | Climate intelligence — outdoor sport disruption, event cancellation protocol |
| macro/macro-governance-scandal.md | Governance scandal intelligence — corruption, doping, match-fixing |
| market/market-football.md | Football market intelligence — Tier 1 |
| market/market-basketball.md | Basketball market intelligence — Tier 1 |
| market/market-cricket.md | Cricket market intelligence — Tier 1/2 |
| market/market-kabaddi.md | Kabaddi market intelligence — Tier 2 |

| market/market-rowing.md | Rowing market intelligence — Tier 4 |
| market/market-table-tennis.md | Table Tennis market intelligence — Tier 4 |

---

## How to use SportMind with an AI agent

### Option 1 — System prompt injection (any agent)

Paste the relevant skill markdown directly into your agent's system prompt.
No installation required. Works with any LLM.

### Option 2 — Claude Code / MCP

```bash
# See examples/starter-pack/ for full setup
claude mcp add sportmind /path/to/sportmind
```

### Option 3 — LangChain / CrewAI / AutoGen

```python
# See examples/starter-pack/ for full wrapper
from sportmind import load_skill
skill = load_skill("sports/football")
agent.add_context(skill)
```

### Option 4 — Fan Token Intel integration

SportMind is designed to complement Fan Token Intel (fantokenintel.com).
Layer 1 skills provide domain context. Layer 2 skills produce athlete modifiers
that adjust FTI's base signal scores. Layer 3 provides on-chain commercial intelligence.
Read fan-token/fan-token-why.md first to understand the foundational value thesis.

See examples/fan-token-intel/ for the integration pattern.

---

## Modifier system quick reference

```
adjusted_signal = base_signal × composite_modifier

composite_modifier ranges:
  ≥ 1.20    →  Elite conditions — high conviction
  1.10–1.19 →  Strong — normal sizing
  1.00–1.09 →  Neutral — follow base signal
  0.90–0.99 →  Minor concerns — reduce or wait
  0.80–0.89 →  Significant concerns — caution
  0.70–0.79 →  Major degradation — likely skip
  < 0.70    →  Severe — do not enter
```

---

## Contributing

See CONTRIBUTING.md. Sport skills follow templates/template-new-sport-skill.md.
Athlete skills follow templates/template-new-athlete-skill.md.

14 community stub sports are ready to be filled — see GOOD_FIRST_ISSUES.md.

**New to SportMind?** Read README.md first. See examples/ for
6 complete historical examples with calibration analysis.

For developer resources: see agent-prompts/agent-prompts.md for ready-to-deploy system prompts
and glossary.md for sport terminology reference.

---

## Developer resources

| Resource | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `examples/starter-pack/integration-standalone-system-prompt.md` | System prompt injection (any LLM) |
| `examples/starter-pack/integration-langchain-python.md` | LangChain / CrewAI / AutoGen |
| `examples/starter-pack/integration-claude-and-mcp.md` | Claude Code / MCP |
| `examples/` | 6 historical scenarios with correct SportMind reasoning |
| `examples/starter-pack/README.md` | 5 validation playbooks with pass criteria |
| `core/context-window-management.md` | Token budget planning; minimum viable loading sets |
| `core/multi-agent-coordination.md` | Session state; multi-sport routing; production patterns |

## Compatible platforms

SportMind is the intelligence layer. Partners provide data or infrastructure.
SportMind remains MIT licensed and platform-agnostic.

| Platform | Role |
|---|---|
| Fan Token Intel (fantokenintel.com) | Primary signal data — provides base_score |
| Chiliz / Socios | Blockchain infrastructure — on-chain Layer 3 data |
| Azuro (azuro.org) | Prediction market protocol — DeFi liquidity context |
| Claude / Claude Code | Agent reasoning engine — MCP or system prompt |
| LangChain / CrewAI / AutoGen | Agent framework — skill context injection |
| OpenAI / GPT-4o | Agent reasoning engine — system prompt |
| Any LLM | Agent reasoning engine — structured markdown context |

Full integration patterns: platform/integration-partners.md
API contracts: platform/api-contracts.md
